types.label: Bi-weekly check-in
types.description: Steady catch-ups on workload, motivation, and how things are really going.

types.label: Performance & feedback
types.description: When you need to name a gap or missed expectation clearly and constructively.

types.label: Growth & career plan
types.description: When someone wants to grow, step up, or plan what comes next.

types.label: Something feels off
types.description: When energy, behaviour, confidence, or communication has shifted and you want to understand before assuming.

types.label: Onboarding check-in
types.description: First few weeks of a new joiner — how they're settling, what's still unclear, and where they need unblocking.

types.label: Monthly Check-in
types.description: A guided monthly 1:1 — catch up on last month, talk requests, rate the building blocks, swap feedback, review goals, and agree a summary.
